case_title: HOUSE OF BRANHAM A CORP DBA COLONIAL HOME PRODUCTS et al VS OCAMPO LEONILA

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT OCAMPO LEONILA

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,149.78 FILED BY HOUSE OF BRANHAM A CORP DBA COLONIAL HOME PRODUCTS HOUSE OF BRANHAM A CORP DBA NATIONAL ACCEPTANCE CO AS TO DEFENDANT OCAMPO LEONILA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-11-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00

TRIAL RESET TO MAR-18-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
